message:
fix(core): clippy + fmt + test robustness for KPI module (br-3vwi.7.1)

- Fix clippy lints: doc_markdown, int_plus_one, significant_drop_tightening,
  manual_let_else, too_many_arguments, float_cmp
- Apply cargo fmt formatting
- Fix test race: replace global-state-dependent report test with
  direct SampleRing test to avoid parallel test interference
- Alphabetize re-exports in lib.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
